summary: P1-P7 comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly. LLM endpoints using Emergent GPT fallback (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY not set - expected behavior). Customer Portal Finance tab shows summary stats, invoice list with status colors, payment info. Contract detail shows version info, legal modules, digital signature options, commercial conditions.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ P1 LLM Provider: GET /api/admin/llm/status returns provider info (active_provider=emergent_gpt_fallback), migration status, metrics
✅ P1 LLM Provider: GET /api/admin/llm/health returns live health check (status=healthy, provider=emergent_gpt_fallback)
✅ P1 LLM Provider: POST /api/admin/llm/test works with default and custom prompts
✅ P1 LLM Provider: POST /api/admin/llm/test-agent-flow tests session continuity with initial + followup responses
✅ P2 Finance: GET /api/customer/finance returns summary (total_invoices, outstanding, paid), invoices with payment_status/severity/reminder_level, bank_transfer_info
✅ P2 Finance: Frontend Finance tab shows 4 stat cards (Rechnungen, Offen, Bezahlt, Ausstehend)
✅ P2 Finance: Invoice cards show status badges with colors (Bezahlt=green), amounts (Netto/USt/Brutto), dates
✅ P3 Contract: GET /api/customer/contracts/{id} returns versions array, evidence_trail array, has_pdf, pdf_url
✅ P3 Contract: Frontend shows VERSION: v1 in contract header
✅ P3 Contract: Digital signature section with Zeichnen/Name eingeben options, document hash displayed
✅ P3 Contract: Legal modules (Rechtliche Bestimmungen) with checkboxes for AGB, Datenschutz, KI-Nutzung, Zahlungsbedingungen, SLA, AVV
✅ P3 Contract: Commercial conditions (Gesamtvertragswert, Aktivierungsanzahlung 30%, Monatsrate, Laufzeit)
✅ P4 Reconciliation: POST /api/admin/billing/reconcile syncs Quote/Contract/Invoice payment status
✅ P4 Webhooks: GET /api/admin/webhooks/history returns webhook events audit log
✅ P5 E2E: POST /api/admin/e2e/verify-flow checks entire Lead→Quote→Contract→Invoice→Payment chain
✅ P6 Legal: POST /api/admin/legal/check-outreach validates DSGVO, UWG, suppression, opt-out
✅ P6 Legal: POST /api/admin/legal/check-contract/{id} validates legal modules, calculation, customer data
✅ P6 Legal: GET /api/admin/legal/compliance returns risks, audits, opt_outs, suppressions summary
✅ P7 Outbound: GET /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id} returns lead detail with timeline
✅ P7 Outbound: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}/send includes Legal Gate check
✅ P7 Outbound: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/respond tracks response type (positive/negative/opt_out)
✅ P7 Outbound: POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/handover supports quote/meeting/nurture handover types
✅ Auth: Customer portal access via magic link (portal-access → verify-token → JWT) working correctly

test_credentials.customer_portal: Magic link auth via /api/admin/customers/portal-access (test customer: max@testfirma.de)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1-P7 features fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/llm/status (provider info), GET /api/admin/llm/health (live health check), POST /api/admin/llm/test (LLM test), POST /api/admin/llm/test-agent-flow (agent flow with session). POST /api/admin/billing/reconcile (reconciliation). GET /api/admin/webhooks/history (webhook audit). POST /api/admin/e2e/verify-flow (E2E verification). POST /api/admin/legal/check-outreach, POST /api/admin/legal/check-contract/{id}, GET /api/admin/legal/compliance (legal gates). POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/outreach/{outreach_id}/send (with legal gate), POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/respond, POST /api/admin/outbound/{lead_id}/handover (outbound machine). GET /api/customer/finance (full finance data with invoices, quotes, contracts, bank info). GET /api/customer/contracts/{id} (enhanced with versions, evidence_trail, signature_preview, has_pdf). Customer auth flow: POST /api/admin/customers/portal-access → extract magic token from portal_url → POST /api/auth/verify-token → get JWT. DEEPSEEK_API_KEY is not set, so LLM uses Emergent GPT fallback (expected behavior).
